ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Chicken Breast (58%), Crumb Coating (42%) (Water, Wheat Flour, Canola Oil, Wheat Semolina, Salt, Wheat Gluten, Sugar, Yeast, Vegetable Gum (412), Dehydrated Vegetables (Garlic, Celery), Rice Bran Oil, Herbs, Spice (Turmeric), Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein (Wheat)).
